title: ItemDefinition
description: Defines an item that can exist in the player's Caretaker Satchel (inventory).

display_name.description: Human-readable name shown in the UI.

description.description: Flavor text shown in the satchel UI.

icon_asset.description: Path to the item's icon sprite (relative to assets/).

carry_sprite_asset.description: Path to the sprite shown floating above the player's head when carrying this item.

stackable.description: Whether multiple of this item can occupy a single satchel slot.

max_stack.description: Maximum stack size per slot (only relevant if stackable=true).

preparation.description: If this item is a raw_diet, defines how it becomes a prepared_diet.

consumable_by.description: List of animal_ids that can consume this item.

station_object_id.description: The room object where preparation happens (e.g., 'prep_table').

chore_type.description: Type of mini-chore triggered during preparation.

output_item_id.description: The item_id of the prepared version.
